subject: fix(ui): redesign icon waves and replace gradient bubbles with solid primary
body:
Icon: Replace straight vertical lines with actual sine wave curves to convey
tone/sound. Shift gradient midpoint so cyan reads more clearly. Remove
redundant back shadow bubble. Angle tail slightly left for natural feel.

Chat bubbles: Replace primary→primaryContent gradient with solid bg-primary.
The gradient caused uneven text contrast — dark text disappeared at the bottom
of longer messages. Solid primary gives consistent readability with
primaryContent text throughout. Updated tone tag overlay to use primaryContent
instead of neutral for better blending on primary surface.

Also replaced gradient on Create Chat buttons (home + desktop sidebar) and
send button for consistency. Removed unused LinearGradient imports from
BubbleContent, ComposeBar, home, and DesktopLayout.

Tags: ui, icons, theme, code-quality
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: uniwind-migration
Semver: minor
